basic_details.job_title: DRDO GTRE Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 150 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India
basic_details.post_name: Apprentice Trainees – Technical Entry (Graduate Engineering, Diploma Engineering, ITI Trades) and Non-Technical Graduate General
basic_details.job_location: GTRE, CV Raman Nagar, Bengaluru – 560093, Karnataka
basic_details.short_information: The latest Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Apprentice Trainees – Technical Entry (Graduate Engineering, Diploma Engineering, ITI Trades) and Non-Technical Graduate General posts! Published at DRDO Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 150 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the minimum age of 18 years as on 06-06-2026 and possessing a relevant Graduate, Diploma, or ITI qualification can attend the walk-in interview on 06-06-2026. Find all details about the GTRE

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates must be registered on the NATS or NAPS portal before attending the walk-in interview. Only those candidates who have passed the qualifying examination in the year 2022 or later are eligible; candidates who passed before 2022 are NOT eligible. Only those who have passed as regular candidates are eligible. Candidates whose results have not been declared/available as on the date of interview will NOT be considered. Provisional Degree Certificates are acceptable at the time of joining; however, final degree certificates must be submitted as and when received. | The marks obtained in the qualifying examination must be mentioned in percentage. Candidates with CGPA must convert to percentage as per their university/institute norms; a document regarding the conversion formula must be produced during document verification. | Age Limit | Mandatory Pre-Registration Portal | Ineligibility Conditions

vacancy_details.Discipline: Electricals & Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation / Telecom Engg.
Computer Science / Computer Engg. / Information Science & Technology Engg.
Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation
Computer Science Engg. / Computer Networking / Information Technology

vacancy_details.Trade: Computer Operator & Programming Assistant (COPA) / Data Entry Operator

vacancy_details.Discipline: B.Sc (Chemistry / Physics / Maths / Electronics / Computer etc.)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the norms of Govt. of India

selection_process: Stage 1 Mandatory pre-registration on NATS/NAPS portal before walk-in interview
Stage 2 Walk-in Interview with document verification at GTRE, Bengaluru on 06-06-2026
Stage 3 Shortlisting based on academic merit / written test / interview or combination thereof
how_to_apply: Candidates must attend the walk-in interview on 6th June 2026 (Saturday) at Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), DRDO, CV Raman Nagar, Bengaluru – 560093. There is no online application form on the GTRE/DRDO website. Prior registration on the respective portal (NATS or NAPS) is mandatory before attending the walk-in interview.

Candidates must report at the venue by 0900 hrs. Candidates must bring the duly filled Registration Form (Annexure I) along with the Undertaking (Annexure II) in the prescribed format and all self-attested documents with original certificates for preliminary verification during the walk-in interview. No accommodation/transport/transport allowance will be provided by GTRE during the selection process or training.
Documents to be Carried for Walk-in Interview (Original + One Set of Self-Attested Photocopy):
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates must be registered on NATS (Graduate/Diploma) or NAPS (ITI) portal before attending the walk-in interview. Only candidates who have passed the qualifying examination in the year 2022 or later are eligible; those who passed before 2022 are NOT eligible. Only candidates who have passed as regular candidates are eligible; candidates who passed through distance or correspondence mode are not eligible. Candidates with higher qualifications than the essential qualification prescribed are NOT eligible. Candidates with training or job experience of one year or more after attaining the essential qualification are NOT eligible. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training under any organisation are NOT eligible. Reservations will be applied as per provisions of The Apprentices Act, 1961; SC/ST/OBC Non-Creamy Layer candidates must produce relevant certificates issued by the Competent Authority. PWD candidates are eligible only for designated trades as per Apprenticeship Rules. Selected candidates must produce a valid police verification certificate at the time of joining from their place of last residence (for at least past one year) and permanent address. Selected candidates must produce a Certificate of Physical Fitness in the prescribed format issued by an authorised Medical Officer of any Government Hospital. Marks in the qualifying examination must be mentioned in percentage; candidates with CGPA must convert to percentage as per university/institute norms. Selected candidates must be in a position to join on the prescribed date; failure to report by the scheduled date will be treated as disinterest and candidature may be forfeited. Selected candidates must execute a contract for one year of training as per The Apprentices Act, 1961. Canvassing/influencing in any form shall lead to disqualification. This apprenticeship training does not carry any guarantee of employment at GTRE on completion. No accommodation/transport/transport allowance will be provided by GTRE during selection or training. GTRE reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies and to withdraw/cancel the advertisement/selection process without assigning any reason. For further queries, email: [email protected]
